data.body: 1edf TDD RED: authored 6 close-gate tests (1 happy parent-close visible + 5 held-out: transitive grandchild, epic-blocks-guard, 2 leaf no-regression). Confirmed RED for right reason: parent-close tests fail on the parent-blind precondition ('no commit references it'); guards green. Held out the edge suite. Dispatching implementer with happy-path only.
